creator: rene@FreeBSD.org
text:
I've updated the UPDATING file.

Note that ruby 2.X has been removed for a while, so keeping its updating entries makes little sense IMO. I've merged the instructions of the 20190420 entry in the 20220421 entry and updated the references to it. Lastly, the emacs-27 instructions were already there in the 20211115 so I just removed the dangling reference.
